summary: Wired opencode-codebase-memory into learning pipeline and system health monitoring. (1) ingest-sessions.mjs: added enrichErrorContext call after processDelegationLog to enrich anti-pattern descriptions with symbol context from indexed repos. (2) system-health.mjs: added auditCodebaseMemory() function that loads CodebaseMemory, lists indexed repos, opens GraphStore for each repo to get node/edge stats, returns DORMANT if no repos indexed, HEALTHY if nodes>0, UNKNOWN if package unavailable (expected in Node.js context). Wired into main audit loop as 9th subsystem. (3) package.json: added 'codebase:analyze' script to run opencode-codebase CLI. All changes wrapped in try/catch for graceful degradation.
